title: OnePlus executive who dismissed shutdown rumors has now stepped down
description: OnePlus India CEO Robin Liu has stepped down, the company has confirmed.

title: I quit my job at KPMG and moved to India to become a poet. I was sick of only getting to live life on weekends.
description: Namrata Yadav decided to forgo the corporate grind and move to India to focus on her poetry. It's tested her mettle in more ways than one.

title: India's luxury promise hits a wall: not enough malls to shop in
description:
STORY: :: New Delhi, India

India has millions of newly affluent consumers who want to spend, but not enough luxury stores in which to do it.

title: Jinnah as a ‘leader of minorities’? Jammu University launches probe after protests over new syllabus
description: Headed by Professor Naresh Padha of the Physics Department, the committee has been tasked with examining the “syllabus of political science” in light of concerns raised by some students.

title: India's Stuffcool made a Qi 2.2 3-in-1 foldable travel charger, and it's much better than I imagined
description: Stuffcool Nexi is a Qi 2.2-based travel charger, and the best part is that it has the ability to charge three devices at once.

title: Manu Joseph: Why India’s potholes seem poised to become a political issue at last
description: For decades, potholes, filth and bad roads were dismissed as trivial irritants, unworthy of political attention. That may be changing. As middle-class frustration builds and civic anger spills into public debate, the quality of life could actually matter at t…

title: New Rule Bars Asylum Seekers, DACA Participants from Commercial Driver’s Licenses
description: Introduction Approximately 200,000 immigrant truck drivers across the U.S. have begun losing their commercial driver’s licenses under a new federal rule that took effect March 16, 2026, according to online news aggregator reports [1]. The policy, announced by…
